prompt: I need a simple welcome dashboard that appears in the Content section of the Umbraco backoffice. It should show a heading that says 'Welcome' and a short paragraph underneath. Nothing fancy, just the basics to get started.
assertions: Manifest JSON has type set to 'dashboard'
Manifest JSON includes alias, name, and element fields
Manifest JSON has meta.label and meta.pathname
Manifest JSON has a condition with alias 'Umb.Condition.SectionAlias' and match 'Umb.Section.Content'
Manifest is wrapped in an extensions array inside umbraco-package.json
Element uses @customElement() decorator for registration (not customElements.define)
Element has a render() method returning html template with welcome content
